result_summary: Independent second-model audit of the completed P002 workbench shell. Six read-only reviewer lenses (product, visual/responsive, accessibility, Python/Streamlit, content/DH-method, security/privacy/FAIR) found no P0 or P1. Seven evidence-backed, in-scope repairs were applied on branch claude/p002-independent-audit: sidebar active-row WCAG AA contrast (2.5 to 6.3 on the dark sidebar), removal of the internal 'P003' ticket id from user copy and of three unused accent tokens, future-tense Guided/Research copy, help text on two disabled buttons, a shared experiment-map helper, and runOnSave off. Post-fix verify, a four-viewport browser plus 200%-zoom audit, and a clean-clone rerun all pass. Higher-risk and out-of-scope findings (unused pydantic, boundary-panel redundancy, decorative-border contrast, prior-run provenance nits, P014 egress) were deferred with rationale. The branch was not merged to main and is left for Codex review.
